# PassFields.BackFields

**Object**

An object that represents the fields that display information on the back of a pass.

## Declaration

```swift
object PassFields.BackFields
```

## Discussion

Use this field to provide additional, noncritical information. This field displays in watchOS 7 and later.

## Inherits From

- PassFieldContent
